snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: Radhe Shyam Telugu Glimpse | Prabhas | Pooja Hegde | Radha Krishna Kumar | Justin Prabhakaran
snippet.description:
Radhe Shyam Telugu Movie Glimpse On UV Creations. #RadheShyam 2021 Indian Romantic Drama film ft. Rebel Star Prabhas and Pooja Hegde. Written and directed by Radha Krishna Kumar. Music by Justin Prabhakaran on T-Series, Sound design by Resul Pookutty. Presented by Krishnam Raju under Gopi Krishna Movies and produced by UV Creations and T-Series jointly. The Movie releasing in Telugu, Tamil, Hindi, Kannada and Malayalam.

The epic love tale Radhe Shyam also stars Sachin Khedekar, Priyadarsi Pulikonda, Bhagyashree, Murli Sharma, Kunaal Roy Kapoor, Riddhi Kumar, Sasha Chettri, Sathyan and many others.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

snippet.title: Sunitha & Ram With Suma | Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni Exclusive Interview | Telugu FilmNagar
snippet.description:
Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni Interview With Anchor Suma. Popular Singer Sunitha Upadrasta and Mango Mass Media CEO Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview on Telugu FilmNagar. On this Valentines Day, embrace the special bond watching this exclusive interview hosted by Anchor Suma. #SingerSunitha #RamVeerapaneni #AnchorSuma #SunithaRam #SunithaUpadrasta #SumaKanakala #SunithaRamInterview #ValentinesDaySpecial #TeluguFilmNagar

In the presence of many Tollywood celebrities and well-wishers, Ram Veerapaneni has tied the knot to Singer Sunitha Upadrasta recently. Watch the full interview to learn the most beautiful and interesting facts about the couple.

Singer Sunitha Upadrasta is widely known in South India for super hit songs in Telugu, Tamil and Kannada. In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years. 

Watch Sunitha - Ram Wedding Celebrations: https://bit.ly/3jGz07f

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

Checkout The Trailer in Other Languages👇
Telugu Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/N8B3chilPxI
Malayalam Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/S9Q3qfIuehU
Kannada Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/GhAe_8rykbg

#Chakra #ChakraTrailer #WelcomeToDigitalINDIA #Vishal #YuvanShankarRaja #ShraddhaSrinath #ReginaCassandra #MSAnandan #VFF

Starring : Vishal, Shraddha Srinath, Regina Cassandra, Robo Shankar, K.R.Vijaya, Srushti Dange, Manobala

snippet.title: EXCLUSIVE: Valentine's Day Special - Prajwal Devaraj & Ragini Prajwal Interview With Anushree
snippet.description:
Click to Subscribe:- https://bit.ly/AnushreeAnchor
Presenting the Episode of Valentine's Day special interview with Anchor Anushree ft. Prajwal Devaraj and his valentine Ragini Prajwal

Tune into watching the glimpses of the candid Kannada interview where love is in abundance and questions that spill the beans. Follow the charming love tale of Mr and Mrs Prajwal Devaraj and how they later convinced for Marriage. 

With fun-filled topics and laughter as its pretext, love canopies the show with the Kannada film industries dashing couple, that you'll not want to miss viewing. 

Don't forget to click the subscribe button for watching the whole episode and many more such exciting shows sooner.

snippet.title: Carrom Ki Rani ▶ Ramji Gulati | Jannat Zubair | Mr. Faisu | Official Video
snippet.description:
Saregama Music presents a brand new love song "Carrom Ki Rani" in the voice of "Ramji Gulati" featuring "Jannat Zubair" and  "Mr. Faisu". The song is composed by Ramji Gulati & the lyrics are penned by Moody and Akkhar. 

Audio Credits: 
👑Singer: Ramji Gulati
👑Music: Ramji Gulati
👑Lyrics: MOODY, AKKHAR
👑Arranger: Mr.Hit (UWF Studios)
👑Mixed: United White Flag Studios
👑Mastering: Donal Whelan

👑Video Director: United White Flag
👑Cast: Ramji Gulati - Jannat Zubair - Mr. Faisu
👑Special Appearance: Ayaan Zubair Rahmani
👑Dop : Rahul Arora
👑Editor : Varun Arora
👑VFX : Lucky Tan
👑Drone : Tanish Arora
👑Styling : Dharti Gulati
👑Choreographer : Amit Syal
👑Production : Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
👑Poster Designs: F1 Digitals
👑Make-up & Hair: Vicky hans
👑Photography: Anish S Ajmera
👑Team UWF: Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
👑Artist Management:
👑Ramji Gulati - Purple Star Entertainment
👑Mr. Faisu - Qyuki 

👑Special Thanks: Riverland Dubai, Dubai Parks & Resort

#SaregamaMusic
#JannatZubair
#Faisu
#RamjiGulati
#Fainat


#CarromKiRani

Lyrics: 
Mujhko Paake Tu Lucky Feel Karegi,
Dil Mein Reh Ke Saath Kya Dil Ki Deal Karegi,

Mujhko Paake Tu Lucky Feel Karegi,
Dil Mein Reh Ke Saath Kya Dil Ki Deal Karegi,

Jaise Sapno Mein Dekhi Thi Haan Bilkul Waisi Hai By God Tu,

Carrom Ki Rani Na Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

Teri Photo Laga Rakhi Hai,
Mene Apni Wall Pe,
Baat Karade Mana Lunga,
Tere Ghar Wale Ek Call Pe,

Teri Photo Laga Rakhi Hai,
Mene Apni Wall Pe,
Baat Karade Mana Lunga,
Tere Ghar Wale Ek Call Pe,

Main Kuch Bhi Kar Jaunga Tere Liye,
Ek Baar Bol Tu,

Carrom Ki Rani Ni Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

Mere Sath Rehne Ka,
Ek Bar Iraada Karle Tu,
Tujhe Beach Pasand Hai Baby,
Tujhe Beach Pe Ghar Le Dun,

Mere Sath Rehne Ka,
Ek Bar Iraada Karle Tu,
Tujhe Beach Pasand Hai Baby,
Tujhe Beach Pe Ghar Le Dun,

Tere Saath Mein Photo Daal Ke 
Sab Ladkiyo Ke Dil Tod Du

Carrom Ki Rani Ni Chodhta
Tujhe Kese Chordh Du

snippet.title: Indians and YoYo Rooms Ft. Gagan Arora, Apoorva Arora & Shreya Mehta | The Timeliners
snippet.description:
Valentine’s day in India is a synonym to struggle, adventure, and a lot of enthusiasm. Let’s explore the real struggle to get a room for you and your loved one on Valentine's through this funny sketch. Enjoy this video and share it with your loved ones and do let us know about your crazy Valentine’s Day experiences in the comment section.

snippet.title: Tera Yaar Jamanat P Aaya (Kalyug) - Pardeep Boora | Pooja Hooda | Raj Mawar | New Haryanvi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Saga Music presents New Haryanvi songs Haryanvi 2021 - Tera Yaar Jamanat P Aaya - Kalyug Haryanvi song 2021 Starring Pardeep Boora & Pooja Hooda.

Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi Bata Kis Ki Fielding Laani Se Tera Yaar Jamanat Pe Aaya Kalyug latest Haryanvi song 2021 by Raj Mawar, Manisha Sharma is out now !!

बता किसकी फिल्डिंग लाणी स तेरा यार जमानत पर आया !!

#HaryanviHits #PardeepBoora #PoojaHooda #Kalyug #HarynaviSongs #NewHaryanviSong #TeraYaarJamanatPeAaya #HaryanviSong

Subscribe us to get the latest and superhits collections of हरियाणवी songs.
 ✿Subscribe Us: https://www.youtube.com/HaryanviHits 
 ✿Like us on FB: https://www.facebook.com/HaryanviTadkaHits/

Credits:
Song: Kalyug - Tera Yaar Jamanat Pe Aaya
Artist: Pardeep Boora 👉https://instagram.com/pardeepboora03
Pooja Hooda 👉https://instagram.com/pooja_hooda_official
Co-Artist: Yusuf Khan & MD & Amar Kataria
Lyrics: Neenu Sindhar 👉https://instagram.com/neenusindhar
Singer: Raj Mawar & Manisha Sharma
Music: RK Crew
Mixing & Mastering: D Chandu
DOP: Prakash Kumar
Director: Ameet Chaudhary
Producer: Sumeet Singh
Asst. Director: MD Bootable
Production: Addy Kalyan
Jimmy Jib: Gourav Chhachar
Poster Design: Sachin Siwach
Make Up: Suresh & Surender
Lights Equipment- Ranjeet & Dheeraj Bishnoi
Editor: Monty
Special Thanks: Dabra Village, Manmohan, Angad Boora Groups: Kashi Group Lights Equipment - Ranjeet & Dheeraj Bishnoi

Label: Saga Music 
Digital Managed By: Unisys

Haryanvi song Haryanavi Kalyug Haryanvi Gaana Lyrics:
 
Paap Dulha Koni Kare 
Gangajal chidke,
Khoon te muh dhove uth tadke,
Digi ke ma gede rakhe bori me bande,
Pick pe chale tere kale dhande,
Kade ho ja nya kand dar laage nyu kalja Hale se ,
Pair fuk fuk Dhara kar darling dhikhe Kalyug Chale se

Badmasha gel Milu badmash ban ke ,
Chahan aala k sada sath Su khada,
Mount Averest Jisa Yaar se Tera jit marji tu diye ada

Sikander ne b jug jeeta bta ke paya

Bta kiski fielding laani se tera yaar jamanat p aaya 
Loga ka chal dekh dekh ke margi dil ki fieling sari
Ib jo marji wo karna se jio maro duniyadari

Romance karn ki Umar teri casa me galye tu betha 
Torcher Tera dimag ho liya nafrat paale tu betha 

Sawere uthate hi yaar tera pistol me goli gale se 

Pair fuk fuk dhrya kar darling dhikhe Kalyug chale se 
Badmashi ki koi Umar nhi incounter ya gangwar 

Jhukti h sari Dunia dum hona chaiye jhukhane me 
Neenu sindhar name hi kafi madam Ji Haryana me 

Rob jamane ke chakar me kyu pyar ka khel bnaya
 
Bta kiski fielding lani se tera yaar jamanat pe  aaya
tags: tera yaar jamanat p aaya song
bata kis ki fielding laga ne se tera yaar jamanat per aaya

snippet.title: Singer Sunitha & Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview | Promo | Anchor Suma | Telugu FilmNagar
snippet.description:
Popular Singer Sunitha Upadrasta and Mango Mass Media CEO Ram Veerapaneni First Ever Interview Promo on Telugu FilmNagar. Join us in embracing the special bond on Feb 14th at 3 PM exclusively on Telugu FilmNagar. The TFN Exclusive interview is hosted by Anchor Suma. #SingerSunitha #RamVeerapaneni #AnchorSuma #SunithaRam #SunithaUpadrasta #TeluguFilmNagar

In the presence of many Tollywood celebrities and well-wishers, Ram Veerapaneni has tied the knot to Singer Sunitha Upadrasta recently. Watch the full interview to learn most beautiful and interesting facts about the couple.

Singer Sunitha Upadrasta is widely known in South India for super hit songs in Telugu, Tamil and Kannada. In her glorious career started with Ee Velalo Neevu song from Gulabi as playback singer, Sunitha was honoured with many Nandi Awards and Filmfare awards. Apart from singing, Sunitha is also known as a dubbing artist for lending her voice to many star heroines. 

Ram Veerapaneni, the CEO of Mango Mass Media Pvt Ltd and Whacked Out Media Pvt Ltd, is popularly known in the Telugu media and entertainment industry for the last 23 years. 

Watch Sunitha - Ram Wedding Celebrations: https://bit.ly/3jGz07f

snippet.title: Raule (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Gurlez Akhtar | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents New Punjabi Song of 2021 Raule By Jassa Dhillon Ft.Gurlez Akhtar.

Listen to Raule on all audio streaming platforms: https://backl.ink/raule.oyd

Spotify: https://backl.ink/raule/spotify

Apple Music: https://backl.ink/raule/apple

JioSaavn: https://backl.ink/raule/saavn

Gaana: https://backl.ink/raule/gaana

Wynk: https://backl.ink/raule/wynk

Resso: https://backl.ink/raule/resso

Hungama: https://backl.ink/raule/anghama

Track Credits:
Title: Raule
Singer: Jassa Dhillon ft. Gurlez Akhtar
Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: B Sanj
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Gagan Shahi
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions
Edit  : GS Bhari 
Colour Grading : Prashant B Dhotre
Vfx by - shudhanshu jaiswal
Special Thanks - Big Media & YGD Media
Producer - Nav Sandhu
Label : Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri

Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

Lyrics/Composer: Jassa Dhillon
Music: Gur Sidhu
Mix Master: B Sanj
Director/DOP:  Sukh Sanghera
Female Lead: Gagan Shahi
Instagram Promotions - Boss Music Productions
Edit  : GS Bhari 
Colour Grading : Prashant B Dhotre
Vfx by - shudhanshu jaiswal
Special Thanks - Big Media & YGD Media
Producer - Nav Sandhu
Label : Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri

Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​

Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​

Enjoy And Stay Connected With Artist || Gur Sidhu
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta​
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial​
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu​
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing CRASH COURSE- 3 DAYS LEFT!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA

Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

snippet.title: Nandini - Episode 451 | 13 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the Super hit Serial "Nandini" that airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar a rich influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagamî, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekharís past misdeed and regain the three ëKalachakramí .

snippet.description:
#lakshminakshathra #onedaytrip #alappuzha  #backwaters #houseboat #kuttanad #ghodacademy


📣Here's a little snippet of my skincare routine with Neutriderm Moisturising Lotion and Dermavive Hydra Cleanser @neutriderm_india @dermavive_India📣
                                        
                             📚ghodacademy📔
One of the best OET Online & Offline Training centers in Kerala.

OET പഠനം അനായാസം ഇനി നിങ്ങൾക്കു മുന്നിൽ.
അസാധ്യമെന്നു നിങ്ങൾ കരുതുന്ന Grammar നിഷ്പ്രയാസം സാധ്യമാക്കുന്ന വേദിയാണ് ഞങ്ങൾ നിങ്ങൾക്കു മുന്നിൽ തുറന്നു നൽകുന്നത്.
ഇന്ത്യയിലെ Top Online and Offline OET Training Centre ആയ GHOD ACADEMY മാത്രം നിങ്ങൾക്കു നൽകുന്ന സവിശേഷതകൾ....!!
1. Exclusively for OET, Intensive Training for 500 Hours.
2. 30 Hours Basic grammar.
3. 50 Hours OET GRAMMAR
4. 180 hours Live Reading and  listening sessions
5. Individual attention for writing & speaking.
6. Mock Test after every 10 Hours Individual classes.
7. Flexible and convenient time.
8. Unlimited Time duration.
9. Feedback session.
10. Grammar assistance.
11. One tutor for one student.
12. Assistance to take exam date.
     ഓരോ കുട്ടിയുടെയും കഴിവുകളും, പോരാഴ്മകളും, മനസ്സിലാക്കി അവരെ ശരിയായ ദിശാ ബോധത്തിലേക്ക് നയിക്കുന്ന പ്രസ്ഥാനമാണ്  GHOD ACADEMY..!!!

snippet.title: कोण होती पूजा चव्हाण? Who was Pooja Chavan? Maharashtra Minister | Maharashtra News | Sanjay Rathod
snippet.description:
पूजा चव्हाण ही बीड जिल्ह्यातील परळीची रहिवाशी होती. पुजा सामाजिक आणि राजकीय कार्यक्रमात नेहमीच पुढे असायची. काही फोटोंमध्ये ती माजी मंत्री पंकजा मुंडे, खासदार प्रितम मुंडे यांच्यासोबत कार्यक्रमांमध्ये आणि प्रचारातही सोबत दिसत असायची. शिवसेनेचे यवतमाळमधील मंत्री संजय राठोड यांच्यासोबतचे तिचे काही फोटोसुद्धा सोशल मिडीयावर पोस्ट केलेले आहेत. तसेच त्यांच्या समर्थनार्थ तिने काही फेसबुक पोस्टसुद्धा केलेल्या आहेत. पुजा ही बंजारा समाजाची होती आणि ती समाजाच्या कार्यक्रमांमध्ये सहभागी असायची.

#Lokmat #Sanjayrathod #Poojachavan #Pankajamunde #Mahavikasaghadi #Pritammunde 
Subscribe to Our Channel 👉🏻  
https://www.youtube.com/user/LokmatNews?sub_confirmation=1

आमचा video आवडल्यास धन्यवाद. Like, Share and Subscribe करायला विसरू नका!
मित्रांसोबत गप्पा मारताना विश्वसनीय, संशोधनावर आधारीत माहिती सादर करायची असेल तर लोकमतचे चॅनल सबस्क्राईब करा. कारण या चॅनलवर तुम्हाला पाहायला मिळतील अतिशय अभ्यासू, वेगळ्या अँगलच्या बातम्या ! राजकारण, क्राईम, मनोरंजन आणि क्रीडा क्षेत्रातील अनुभवी पत्रकार तुमच्यासाठी आणत आहेत दर्जेदार आणि जाणते करणाऱ्या बातम्या....

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 13 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

Hello Darling Teri Mili Se Supari, Sochya Pehla He Bata Dyun Tanne

Re Kaise Marna Teri Choice Marunga Re Bina Noise,
Manne Kalakara Ka Bhi Baajan Diya Saaj Na

Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sunke Jaiyae Bhag Na

Dada Ravan.. Dada Ravan..
Dada Ravan… Dada Ravan..

Tere Shehar Mein Jad Raatan Balak Maare Night Out
Chhore Gaam Ke Se Karde Haande Kaand Ladle

Bura Haal Tera Monthly Se Vetan Aale Ka

Re Main Baith Jata Je Ghara Main Chhod Deta Keh Ke
Par Ye Jutta Aale Kutte Baba Aale Baaz Na

Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raaz Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sunke Jaiye Bhag Na

Ankh Laal Rahve Meri Mere Jeet Ka Suroor
Log Dekh Ke Kave Se Yo To Daaru Pee Rehya Sai

Kayi Puche Haal Chal Deve Peeth Piche Gaal
Nue Loga Ki Re Baal Chhaniwala Jee Raha Se

Mera Koi Na Se Ant Jake Dekh Le Granth
Chhora Dil Ka Se Sant Bas Ache Kaaz Na

Janeman Ishq Ki Umeed Na Kar Humse ,Hum Maut Se Pyar Rakhte Hai..
Tum Radha Ho Phool Rakha Karo Baalon Mein..
Hum Ravan Ke Bhakat Hai, Aankho Mein Angar Rakhte Hai..

Dada Ravan Ka Pujari Rakhe Yaara Gelya Yaari
Maare Top Ke Shikari Chalan Diya Raj Na

Re Main Wo Ae Su Re Paapi Sidhi Maut Koi Na Maafi
Mera Naam Hi Hai Kaafi Sun Ke Jaiye Bhag Na

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 126 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Omkar and Mayura face a similar deadly situation which changed their lives forever. What game will fate play this time? Watch this sneak peek of the upcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Consumer Awareness | Part - 1 | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Consumer Protection Act, 2019 is a law to protect the interests of the consumers. This act was inevitable to resolve a large number of pending consumer complaints in consumer courts across the country. It has ways and means to solve the consumer grievances speedily.
The basic aim of the Consumer Protection Act, 2019 to save the rights of the consumers by establishing authorities for timely and effective administration and settlement of consumers’ disputes.
Some Rights of Consumers are;
i. To have information about the quantity, quality, purity, potency, price, and standard of goods or services.

ii. To be protected from hazardous goods and services.

iii. To be protected from unfair or restrictive trade practices.

snippet.title: Vijay Rupani વડોદરામાં ચૂંટણીસભામાં ભાષણ કરતાં કરતાં ઢળી પડ્યા
snippet.description:
વિજય રૂપાણી ચૂંટણીસભામાં ભાષણ કરતાં કરતાં ઢળી પડ્યા.

મુખ્ય મંત્રી વિજય રૂપાણી વડોદરામાં ભાષણ કરી રહ્યા હતા.

વ્યસ્ત ચૂંટણીપ્રચાર કાર્યક્રમને કારણે બ્લડ પ્રેશર ઘટી ગયું હોવાની માહિતી મળી છે. 

હવે અમદાવાદની યુએન મહેતા હૉસ્પિટલમાં તેમની આગળ તપાસ થશે.

BBC Indian Sportswoman of the Year : તમારી પસંદના ખેલાડીને વોટ આપવા આ લિંક પર ક્લિક કરો https://bbc.in/3aUtMk6

localized.title: Vijay Rupani વડોદરામાં ચૂંટણીસભામાં ભાષણ કરતાં કરતાં ઢળી પડ્યા
localized.description:
વિજય રૂપાણી ચૂંટણીસભામાં ભાષણ કરતાં કરતાં ઢળી પડ્યા.

મુખ્ય મંત્રી વિજય રૂપાણી વડોદરામાં ભાષણ કરી રહ્યા હતા.

વ્યસ્ત ચૂંટણીપ્રચાર કાર્યક્રમને કારણે બ્લડ પ્રેશર ઘટી ગયું હોવાની માહિતી મળી છે. 

હવે અમદાવાદની યુએન મહેતા હૉસ્પિટલમાં તેમની આગળ તપાસ થશે.

BBC Indian Sportswoman of the Year : તમારી પસંદના ખેલાડીને વોટ આપવા આ લિંક પર ક્લિક કરો https://bbc.in/3aUtMk6

snippet.title: I Used Only RED Things For 24 Hours ❤ Valentine's Day Special
snippet.description:
Hi Guys
So I did a poll if you wanted me to take up this "I will use only red colour things for 24 hours " challenge. You all were quite enthusiastic, so even I took up this Red Colour Challenge very enthusiastically. Tell me how I fared. Also if you want to see me doing more challenges, drop a comment. Oh BTW, Happy Valentine's Day. Love You All

PS: It's my first attempt at challenges, so bhool chook maaf LOL

snippet.title: बसंतपंचमी का महत्व/How to celebrated VasantPanchami पर मांसरस्वती पूजाकी सरलतम विधी/विद्मा के उपाय
snippet.description:
#बसंतपंचमी  #panchamipuja #पीलेमीठेचावल.
#basantpanchami #vasantpanchami #saraswatipuja #saraswati #basant #india #art #festival #love #happybasantpanchami #goddess #puja #photography #bhfyp #indianfestival #basantpanchmi #flowers #goddesssaraswati #knowledge #kites #kittypartyindia #kitty #kolkata #wisdom #ho
https://youtu.be/Q5S0lHYbHRw. बसंत पंचमी पूजा विधी.
#basantpanchami #vasantpanchami #saraswatipuja #saraswati #basant #in
Namaskar.
If u are having any problem and want astrological help , (kundali) then you can whatsaap on his number and get your booking , charges are 2100₹ 
Whatsapp number :8889837279 
जीवन में भूूलकर भी न दोहरायें ये गलतियां ।
https://youtu.be/sF_4bWmg_J8
दारुछुड़ाने का असरदार उपाय.
https://youtu.be/BtCmRXyJ7FY
संकष्टीचतुर्थी -तिलकुटा ब्रत कथा तिलकुटा चौथ की कहानी।
संकष्टी चतुर्थी व्रत पूजाकी सम्पूर्ण तैयारी ।
https://youtu.be/YbSyayC8VWE
सकटचौथ ब्रत पूजन बिधी,तिलकुटा चौथ पूजन बिधी।
https://youtu.be/JMi94j-aGDc
जानिए गणेश जी के सिर पर ही दूर्वा घास क्यों चढाई जाती है।
https://youtu.be/WRAA0NcIcLQ
जाने..गणेश जी की पूजा अकेले क्यों नहीं करना चाहिए
https://youtu.be/hGtcZuE843U
लौंग के गुण अथवा प्रयोग करने से होगी सभी मनोकामना पूर्ण/गुप्त उपाय लौंग द्वारा.
https://youtu.be/wcNoJTk4fqI
बहुलाचौथ ब्रत कथा ,गणेश चतुर्थी व्रत की कथा,बहुलाचौथ ब्रत मे क्या खाएं क्या न खाएं ब्रत की समपूर्ण जानकारी,
कजरीतीज ब्रत पूजन बिधी.
https://youtu.be/KuVk72go-bA
जन्माष्टमी स्पेशल ब्रत पूजन शुभ मुहूर्त.
https://youtu.be/kuzRPX6HvUI
सावनसोमवार ब्रत की उद्मापन बिधी 
https://youtu.be/8pq_-Iufkrw
गणेश जी को दूर्वा क्यों चढाई जाती है पौराणिक कथा.
https://youtu.be/WRAA0NcIcLQ
नौकरी पाने के अचूक उपाय.
https://youtu.be/TkTGCb61rTA
गणेश चतुर्थी तिलकुटा चौथ ब्रत पूजा की तैयारी.
https://youtu.be/YbSyayC8VWE
काली मिर्च के अचूक टोटके उपाय।
https://youtu.be/PJU2CmV1jBk
How to remove Lint balls from ऊनी कपड़े से  at home ,स्वेटर से {lintballs } हटाने के सरल व अनोखे तरीके.
https://youtu.be/xDCFD4MDw2s
26 दिसम्बर 2019 का आखिरी सूर्य ग्रहण भारत में दिखाई देगा क्या है इसकी सावधानियां 
https://youtu.be/dxkQyc7koGs
1 घंटे में बनाएं अंगूठे वाले गर्म मोजे.
https://youtu.be/oFM14eQUVw0
पुराने कपडों से बनाये ऊनी गर्म मोजे कुछ ही मिंटो मे.
https://youtu.be/LqZBqDO2McY
सफेद कपडों से दाग धब्बे कैसे हटाएं 
https://youtu.be/oKLT17ZMSjs
श्रीकृष्ण के सात अद्भुत प्रतिमाएं जिससे सांसारिक दुखों का अंत निश्चित है।
https://youtu.be/RFUcrjpujNE
एक रोटी का उपाय आपकी सभी समस्याओं का अंत आजमाएं जरूर.
https://youtu.be/Y9wdac5CdPk

घर मे बने इस पेस्ट से तांबा पीतल के बर्तन इतने अच्छे से साफ होंगे, cleaning at home.
चांदी के जेवर आभूषण बिल्कुल नये जैसे चमकदार बनाने का आसान तरीका.
https://youtu.be/y5_mJWCC2cs
घर में झगड़ा झंझट तकरार से हैं परेशान तो सुख शांति लाने के लिए यह टोटका।
https://youtu.be/-4wjA9Ujkp8
जीवन में आने वाले शुभ अशु
tags: सरस्वती पूजा से जुड़ी महत्वपूर्ण बातेंबसंत ऋतु परिवर्तन
बसंत पंचमी पर बनाएं पीले मीठे चावल

snippet.title: Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana | Episode - 1 | Don Pruthvi | Pravallika | Kusuma | Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series. 

Directed by: Saikumar Netha

Cast : Don pruthvi, Pravalika Damerla, Aarif, Prem Ranjith
 
Dop: Seshuraj Daddala, Vamshi Srinivas, Dinesh Parchuri, Kala Pavan

Concept : Madhav

Writer's : Raghuram Bahuthama, Manu Alluri.

Music & mixing : Srujan Shashanka

Violin : Sandiliya Pisapati

Editing : Krishna Karthik Vunnava

Vfx : Pavan Kumar Konte

Title design: Nikhil Concepts

Poster design : Design Manchu

Sound Engineer : Vamsi Vinod Nalli.

Co- Director : Malli Karjun Reddy
Assistant directors : Tony Manoj, Jayanth...

Executive producer: Srividya P

Line producer : Sai Harish

Produced by :  Infinitum Media

#TPSV #Infinitummedia #donpruthvi

snippet.title: Sona Lagda (Official Video) Sukriti, Prakriti, Sukhe | Bharatt-Saurabh | Satti Dhillon | New Song
snippet.description:
To celebrate the season of love VYRL Originals brings to you a Valentines special - Sona Lagda sung by the multi-talented twin sisters Sukriti - Prakriti collaborating for the very first time with the hitmaker Sukh-E Muzical Doctorz. This peppy dance song has been co-composed and written by Bharatt-Saurabh and Sukh-E and the music video has been directed by the popular Satti Dhillon. The melodic drop and vibrant music video is sure to get your foot tapping. Are you ready for this banger?

#SukritiPrakriti #SukhE #SonaLagda

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ15fDfJ/

♫ Wynk Music - https://wynk.in/u/V3Rb56bXw

♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/album/sona-lagda

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/p/album/hindi/sona-lagda-2021/MVBj5k9MBCM_

♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/7pef1s876Fl3KO2LH1eSFx?si=_BCadcjtRsynIPQsi8rRow

♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sona-lagda/1551963715?i=1551963717

♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08VWPY8R3?do=play&trackAsin=B08VW8M79N&ref=dm_sh_yjahxy9lbxow6IGh744DFw4fp

♫ YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=8uIgCCHnbBQ&feature=share
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧  Audio Credits

🎤 Singer - Sukriti Prakriti & Sukh E
🎶  Composer - Bharatt – Saurabh & Sukh E
➟ Lyrics - Bharatt – Saurabh & Sukh E
➟ Music Producer - Bharatt-Saurabh
➟ Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay.

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Director Satti Dhillon
➟ Creative Director Pooja Gujral
➟ Dop Shinda singh
➟ Editor Oswin
➟ Choreographer Sahaj singh & Shreoshi
➟ Art director Mr. blacc
➟ Assistant director Sumit kumar & Prince mundi
➟ Assistant choreographer Pranjal Dutta & Priyanka Mitra
➟ Colorist Ercan kucuk (The Post brothers)
➟ Hairstylist (sukhe) Jeevan
➟ Makeup Rajan passi
➟ Still Photography Shivam
➟ Line producer Kuldeep production

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📝 Lyrics

Jab se mili hai teri meri ye nazar
Rab di sau kuch hua hai asar

Lakh lakh munde rakhen meri ni khabar
Ek mainu bas teri hi fikar
Kahin vi tu mainu le ja soneya
Sang raj ke chalan main ambaraan
Tenu takdi phiran din raat ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Mainu apna banale tu yaar ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Light weight jhanjharan juti sadkan nu chumdi phire
Gold chains laake mascara dolled up hoke ghumdi phire
You hotter than the lava baby girl
Lit tera mascara baby girl
Ni rang tera strawberry varga
Ni dil kare khaajaan baby girl

Fashion nova de jean kude
Lakk tera heavy body lean kude
Apple bottoms so fired up
Dil chore kare badi ni tu mean kude
Dil chori kare badi ni tu mean kude

Tenu takdi phiran din raat ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Mainu apna banale tu yaar ve
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Kudi soni tu meriyan baharan ve
One in million lagdi tu yaara ve
Lagdi tu soni lagdi
Mere kaul tu aake baija ve
Mitthiyan gallan karja
Sona lagda tu sona lagda

Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Soni lagdi tu soni lagdi
Sona lagda tu sona lagda
Soni lagdi tu soni lagdi

Sona lagda
